label: Dataset ID
description: Dataset specification identifier
missing_rule: Always populated from the dataset specification

label: Dataset name
description: Dataset specification name
missing_rule: Always populated from the dataset specification

label: Participant ID
description: Study-specific participant identifier
missing_rule: Should uniquely identify a participant within a dataset

label: Wave
description: Study wave or collection occasion
missing_rule: Use NA when no repeated-wave structure is available

label: Year data were collected
description: The year that data collection occured.

label: Age in years
description: Participant age at the observation in years
missing_rule: Use NA when age cannot yet be derived

label: Sex
description: Harmonised participant sex/gender field
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived
notes: Use explicit lookup tables when recoding source categories

label: Country
description: Participant's location at observation point
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived
notes: If not in dataset, assume based on where data were collected

label: Ethnicity
description: Participant ethnicity
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived

label: Participant indigenous status
description: Would this participant be considered indigenous for their country
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived

label: Minority
description: Indicator for if the participant ethnicity indicates they are a minority within their country/region
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived

label: Area-level SES
description: Socioeconomic status for the area the participant lives
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived
notes: Where feasible, based on quintiles, where top 2 and bottom 2 are high and low.

label: Mother's education level
description: Mother's education level
missing_rule: Use Unknown if cannot be derived

label: Screen Time Measurement Type
description: Type of measure used for screen time
notes: Record the type of variable the original study used to capture screen time

label: Screen Time Measure Name
description: Name for screen time measure, if known or provided
missing_rule: Should not be missing - using 'Unknown' or 'Custom' as required

label: Screen Time: Watching (e.g., TV, streaming) on average weekday

label: Screen Time: Watching (e.g., TV, streaming) on usual day

label: Academic Achievement: Academic Achievement - self-rated
description: Based on HBSC Item of teacher perception
notes: Initial variable - likely to be revised

label: Behaviour: Hyperactivity - Behavior Assessment System for Children-2 Hyperactivity subscale
description: Raw score on BASC-2

label: Behaviour: Attention - Behavior Assessment System for Children-2 Attention subscale
description: Raw score on BASC-2

label: Behaviour: Self-regulation - Head-Toes-Knees-Shoulders
description: Raw score on HTKS

label: Behaviour: Bullying - Engaged in bullying other students
description: Binary where TRUE means engaged in behaviour
notes: Initial variable - likely to be revised

label: Behaviour: Bullying - Bullied by other students in the past few months
description: Binary where TRUE means engaged in behaviour
notes: Initial variable - likely to be revised

label: Behaviour: Fighting - Engaged in fighting
description: Binary where TRUE means engaged in behaviour

label: Cognition: Executive Functioning - Behavior Assessment System for Children-2 Executive Functioning subscale
description: Raw score on BASC-2

label: Cognition: Comprehension of Instructions - NEPSY
description: Scaled score on NEPSY

label: Cognition: Phonological Processing - NEPSY
description: Scaled score on NEPSY

label: Cognition: Inhibition Control - NEPSY
description: Scaled score on NEPSY

label: Cognition: Visuomotor Precision - NEPSY
description: Scaled score on NEPSY

label: Cognition: Word Generation - NEPSY
description: Scaled score on NEPSY

label: Mental Health: Anxiety - Behavior Assessment System for Children-2 Anxiety subscale
description: Raw score on BASC-2

label: Mental Health: Depression - Behavior Assessment System for Children-2 Depression subscale
description: Raw score on BASC-2

label: Wellbeing: Emotional Self-control - Behavior Assessment System for Children-2 Emotional Self-control subscale
description: Raw score on BASC-2

label: Wellbeing: Mental Wellbeing - Warwick Edinburgh Mental Wellbeing Scale
description: Raw summed score on WEMWBS
notes: Initial variable - likely to be revised

label: Wellbeing: Life Satisfaction - Cantril Ladder
description: Score on Cantril Ladder

label: Wellbeing: Resilience - Behavior Assessment System for Children-2 Resilience subscale
description: Raw score on BASC-2

label: Wellbeing: Psychological Complains - Feeling Low from HBSC-SCL
description: Score from HBSC-SCL

label: Wellbeing: Irritable - Feeling Low from HBSC-SCL
description: Score from HBSC-SCL

label: Wellbeing: Nervous - Feeling Low from HBSC-SCL
description: Score from HBSC-SCL

label: Wellbeing: Difficulty Sleeping - Feeling Low from HBSC-SCL
description: Score from HBSC-SCL

label: Wellbeing: Body Image - from HBSC
description: On 5 point likert
allowed_values: Much too thin|A bit too thin|About right|A bit too fat|Much too fat
